stemHtml: You read a NOTAM indicating a section of airspace that is closed from the surface up to 3700 ft between specific dates and at certain times of the day. You plan to fly through the area at 3500 ft during one of the dates/times mentioned. Will the NOTAM be a factor to your flight?

options.c: Yes, but not if the aircraft is flown at an altitude of 3501 ft.
